mapper.select: select restoreid, phase, apply_type, old_orderid, new_orderid, keymap_id, DATE_FORMAT(basedate,'%Y/%m/%d') as basedate, custid, cust_nm, birth_dt, rsdnt_altrntv_id, cust_pin, old_jobid, old_version, new_jobid, status, DATE_FORMAT(browse_deadline_dt,'%Y/%m/%d %H:%i:%s') as browse_deadline_dt, DATE_FORMAT(approve_date,'%Y/%m/%d %H:%i:%s') as approve_date, DATE_FORMAT(regdate,'%Y/%m/%d') as regdate, DATE_FORMAT(upddate,'%Y/%m/%d') as upddate, reguserid, upduserid from cotdl.tbl_piirestore a where 1=1 order by restoreid desc

select count(1) from cotdl.tbl_piiextract a, cotdl.tbl_piiorder b, cotdl.tbl_piiorderstep c where 1 =1 and a.orderid=b.orderid and a.archive_date is not null and a.delete_date is not null and b.status = 'Ended OK' and c.orderid=b.orderid and c.steptype = 'EXE_ARCHIVE'
mapper.insert: insert into cotdl.tbl_piirestore (restoreid, phase, apply_type, old_orderid, new_orderid, keymap_id, basedate, custid, cust_nm, birth_dt, rsdnt_altrntv_id, cust_pin, old_jobid, old_version, new_jobid, status, browse_deadline_dt, approve_date, regdate, upddate, reguserid, upduserid) values (#{restoreid}, #{phase, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{apply_type, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{old_orderid}, #{new_orderid}, #{keymap_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, str_to_date(#{basedate, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'%Y/%m/%d'), #{custid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cust_nm, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{birth_dt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rsdnt_altrntv_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cust_pin, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{old_jobid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{old_version, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{new_jobid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, null, null, NOW(), NOW(), #{reguserid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{upduserid, jdbcType=VARCHAR})

select COALESCE(max(restoreid),10000)+1 from cotdl.tbl_piirestore
insert into cotdl.tbl_piirestore (restoreid, phase, apply_type, old_orderid, new_orderid, keymap_id, basedate, custid, cust_nm, birth_dt, rsdnt_altrntv_id, cust_pin, old_jobid, old_version, new_jobid, status, browse_deadline_dt, approve_date, regdate, upddate, reguserid, upduserid) values (#{restoreid}, #{phase, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{apply_type, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{old_orderid}, #{new_orderid}, #{keymap_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, str_to_date(#{basedate, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'%Y/%m/%d'), #{custid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cust_nm, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{birth_dt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rsdnt_altrntv_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cust_pin, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{old_jobid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{old_version, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{new_jobid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, null, null, NOW(), NOW(), #{reguserid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{upduserid, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.update: update cotdl.tbl_piirestore set phase= 'APPROVING', status= 'APPLY', upddate= NOW() where restoreid= #{restoreid}
update cotdl.tbl_piirestore set phase= 'REJECTED', status= 'REJECTED', upddate= NOW() where restoreid= #{restoreid}
update cotdl.tbl_piirestore set phase= 'APPROVED', status= 'ORDERED', upddate= NOW() where restoreid= #{restoreid}

update cotdl.tbl_piiextract set exclude_reason= #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, restore_date= NOW() where orderid= #{orderid} and custid= #{custid, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /*and exclude_reason != 'RESTORE'*/ and ARCHIVE_DATE is not null and ARC_DEL_DATE is null

update cotdl.tbl_piiextract set exclude_reason= null where exists ( select 1 from cotdl.tbl_piirestore r where cotdl.tbl_piiextract.orderid = r.old_orderid and cotdl.tbl_piiextract.custid = r.custid and r.status='APPROVED_BROWSE' and r.status=cotdl.tbl_piiextract.exclude_reason and r.browse_deadline_dt < now() ) /*and exclude_reason != 'RESTORE'*/ and ARCHIVE_DATE is not null and RESTORE_DATE is null and ARC_DEL_DATE is null
mapper.select: select restoreid, phase, apply_type, old_orderid, new_orderid, keymap_id, DATE_FORMAT(basedate,'%Y/%m/%d') as basedate, custid, cust_nm, birth_dt, rsdnt_altrntv_id, cust_pin, old_jobid, old_version, new_jobid, status, DATE_FORMAT(browse_deadline_dt,'%Y/%m/%d %H:%i:%s') as browse_deadline_dt, DATE_FORMAT(approve_date,'%Y/%m/%d %H:%i:%s') as approve_date, DATE_FORMAT(regdate,'%Y/%m/%d') as regdate, DATE_FORMAT(upddate,'%Y/%m/%d') as upddate, reguserid, upduserid from cotdl.tbl_piirestore where restoreid= #{restoreid}
mapper.update: update cotdl.tbl_piirestore set new_orderid= #{new_orderid}, status= #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, upddate= NOW(), upduserid= #{upduserid, jdbcType=VARCHAR} where restoreid= #{restoreid}

update cotdl.tbl_piirestore set new_orderid= #{new_orderid}, status= #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, upddate= NOW(), browse_deadline_dt= DATE_ADD(now(), INTERVAL 3 DAY), approve_date= NOW(), upduserid= #{upduserid, jdbcType=VARCHAR} where restoreid= #{restoreid}
update cotdl.tbl_piirestore set status= (select status from cotdl.tbl_piiorder where orderid= #{new_orderid}) where new_orderid= #{new_orderid}
mapper.select:
select a.restoreid, a.phase, a.apply_type, a.old_orderid, a.new_orderid, a.keymap_id, DATE_FORMAT(a.basedate,'%Y/%m/%d') as basedate, a.custid, a.cust_nm, a.birth_dt, a.rsdnt_altrntv_id, a.cust_pin, a.old_jobid, a.old_version, a.new_jobid, a.status, DATE_FORMAT(a.browse_deadline_dt,'%Y/%m/%d %H:%i:%s') as browse_deadline_dt, DATE_FORMAT(a.approve_date,'%Y/%m/%d %H:%i:%s') as approve_date, DATE_FORMAT(a.regdate,'%Y/%m/%d %H:%i:%s') as regdate, DATE_FORMAT(a.upddate,'%Y/%m/%d %H:%i:%s') as upddate , b.requesterid as reguserid, b.requestername as upduserid from cotdl.tbl_piirestore a, cotdl.tbl_piiapprovalreq b where a.restoreid = b.jobid and b.approvalid = 'RESTORE_APPROVAL'
order by a.restoreid desc limit #{offset}, #{amount}
select count(1) from cotdl.tbl_piirestore a, cotdl.tbl_piiapprovalreq b where a.restoreid = b.jobid and b.approvalid = 'RESTORE_APPROVAL'
select custid from cotdl.tbl_piirestore where status = 'APPROVED_BROWSE' and browse_deadline_dt > now() and reguserid = #{applicant, jdbcType=VARCHAR} order by custid
